scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web,bridge -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm:dev -w apps/server" "npm:dev -w apps/web" "bash -lc 'source .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn --app-dir apps/ai-bridge main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${AI_BRIDGE_PORT:-8001} --reload'"
scripts.e2e:serve: bash -lc 'rm -rf apps/server/data-e2e apps/server/uploads-e2e && PORT=4180 WEB_PORT=5180 APP_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:5180 DATA_DIR=./apps/server/data-e2e UPLOAD_DIR=./apps/server/uploads-e2e MODEL_NAME=gemini-1.5-pro GOOGLE_API_KEY=test-key PASS_SCORE_RATIO=0.7 CONTEXT_MAX_CHARS=12000 RECENT_MESSAGES_N=12 AI_BRIDGE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:65535 AUTH_DEV_EXPOSE_VERIFICATION_CODE=true concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm:dev -w apps/server" "npm:dev -w apps/web -- --host 127.0.0.1"'
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/web
